标题: Dongguan purchasing-grade Dior Run 'n' Dior sneakers | Fusion of minimalist aesthetics and exquisite craftsmanship. The Dior Run 'n' Dior sneakers are designed in a modern style with iconic black and white color scheme. The mesh fabric upper provides breathability and a flexible fit, ensuring all-day comfort for your feet. The geometric lines in black and white create a three-dimensional effect, subtly revealing Dior's elegant sports genes. The shoe body is made of high-tech mesh fabric, with a lightweight design for swift movement, and breathable perforations to regulate foot microclimate. The matte leather logo on the side embellished with embossed "DIOR" enhances the overall texture. The padded tongue and lining provide pressure relief, while the rubber wear-resistant outsole with precise patterns enhances traction for various sports scenes. Continuing the Dior craftsmanship tradition, the shoe upper features smooth lines achieved through laser cutting and seamless heat pressing to reduce seam friction. The layered injection molding technique creates a lightweight and resilient sole. From stitching to bonding, every detail undergoes strict quality control, resulting in a pioneering work that combines fashion and functionality. This is not just a pair of sneakers, but a statement piece essential for the modern wardrobe. In the name of Dior, redefining dynamic elegance. Upper material: Knit fabric; Lining material: Sheepskin; Outsole material: Exclusive TPU molded outsole; Size: 35-40 (Size 40 is custom-made and non-returnable).

Dior 25Pre-Fall Berlin 01 couple casual training shoes, a popular item for overseas purchasing. Originally introduced in 2004 as B01, it has been hailed as the most beautiful training shoe for the past 20 years. In 2025, KJ made improvements to the B01 model. The design of the shoe can be traced back to the 1970s when West Germany produced them for soldiers' indoor training. Maison Margiela purchased a large quantity of GAT shoes in the late 90s and transformed them, marking the beginning of the fashion journey for this style. Available in sizes 35-46 (custom sizes for men 45-46, non-returnable).
